message:
Agent: Build chat UI with AI Elements and streaming markdown

- Add AI Elements-adapted components: Message, MessageResponse,
  Reasoning (with Shimmer), Tool, Terminal, Queue
- Use Streamdown v2 with @streamdown/code, cjk, math, mermaid plugins
  for rich markdown rendering with vitesse-dark syntax highlighting
- Compose chat input from InputGroup (PromptInput pattern) with
  contextual Steer/Follow-up/Stop buttons during streaming
- Render tool calls via collapsible Tool component with status badges;
  @pierre/diffs File and PatchDiff for code/diff previews
- Add Queue component to display pending steer/follow-up messages
- Fix duplicate React by adding resolve.dedupe to Vite config
- Upgrade streamdown ^1.5.1 → ^2.3.0 for plugin support

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/bsocsbbqlxiq6z6pjk33z84b
